seo_title: 432 Hz, Explained Honestly: Tuning Preference or Healing Frequency? | Sound Bath Calendar
title: 432 Hz, explained honestly
meta_description: 432 Hz is an alternative tuning standard — A tuned to 432 vibrations per second instead of the usual 440. Some musicians love how it feels; there is no solid evidence it has unique healing effects. The honest version, kindly told.
